action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Spaude, Sheehan, Stroud, Anderson, Brown, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Mayadev, McCarville, McGuire, Miresse, Neubauer, Palmeri, Roe, Sinicki, Stubbs, Subeck and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Spreitzer, Habush Sinykin, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Pfaff, Roys, Wall and Carpenter
